title: Rocky Mountain College - Canada.ca
content:
## Rocky Mountain College
You’re eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Arts in Leadership Development
- Bachelor of Arts in Human Services (Counseling Major)
- Bachelor of Arts in Theology
- Bachelor of Religious Studies
You’re not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
